data.author: sjusner
data.message:
Update in observation time comparison (#308)

* last_updated_ is now not updated on reset(), and observation staleness is now determined by comparison to clock_->now() instead of the last observation.

* Readded the observation buffer update on reset.

* Used correct whitespace again

data.author: agoeckner
data.message: Add arm64 version of OpenVDB to CMake module path. (#306)

data.author: Rayman
data.message:
Avoid compilation on jazzy or higher (#301)

On jazzy the released openvdb version is already 10.0.1, so we don't
have to compile the vendor package.

Compilation on the build farm was already quite flakey because the
package is quite heavy, so I'd be best to avoid this. I don't know if
openvdb is also released for ARM or any other ubuntu platforms, but
we'll have to see on the buildfarm.

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Fix the build on debian stretch. (#133)

There is a transitive dependency on Qt5::Widgets, which causes
the build to fail.  Remove the transitive dependencies, which
allows it to compile.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@openrobotics.org>

data.author: Patrick-Lascombe
data.message:
WIS STVL Running on melodic (#108)

* Adding a intermetiate tf::Transform

The intermediate transform was needed to use pcl_ros::transformPointCloud

* PR changes include in measurement_buffer.hpp

* Declaring the tf_stamped in the cpp file and not as a global var

* Remove unneeded dependencies

* Using TF build conversion function instead of doing it manually

* Removing useless dependencies

* Update dependencies and adding ros::Duration to the lookup transform

* Adding include and correcting the double declaration of tf_stamped

data.author: Julian DESVIGNES
data.message:
CMakeLists.txt fix for ROS Melodic's catkin (#87)

Under certain configurations, CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR doesn't point to the project directory.
PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR always point to the directory of the last project() command.

data.author: tasilb
data.message:
Decay acceleration models (#49)

* Rebase onto kinetic-devel

* Fix compilation errors

* Update README for missing OpenVDB includes

* Performance patches

* Rebase onto kinetic-devel

* Fixes loop break bug

* Fix math so voxels don't clear near-instantaneously

* Fix merge errors and add costmap profile switching script

* Make sure voxel publishing member is set

* Comment out fewer lines to avoid reset bug

* Fixed crashes and freezes from map resets

* Use fewer locks, attempt to reduce cost of locks with std instead of boost

* Use costmap mutex to synchronize costmap reset

* Remove out-of-scope script

* Trying out different locks

* cleanup

* Use costmap mutex to synchronize costmap reset

* Formatting fixes

* Cleanup

* Add configuration profiles

* Example config formatting
